response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js, including AI-agent infrastructure work, which aligns with some GenAI/cloud requirements. However, his background lacks explicit experience with Python for AI development, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks. His AI-related work appears more tooling-focused rather than core AI system design.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with TypeScript and Node.js, including AI-agent tooling (MCP) relevant to GenAI workflows.
Proven ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions).
Extensive experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Docker) and scalable systems (handling millions of requests) indicating cloud-native expertise.
concerns: No direct experience with Python for AI/ML development, a core requirement for the role.
Limited or no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems (preferred qualifications).
Background shows more general software engineering than specialized AI/GenAI production experience (only 3 years explicitly in AI-agent infrastructure).

key_factors.factor: AI/GenAI core experience (Python, vector databases, RAG)
